message:
refactor(abi): migrate setgroups, link, rename, faccessat to native syscalls

Replace libc::syscall with frankenlibc_core::syscall wrappers:
- initgroups: sys_setgroups
- link: sys_linkat
- rename: sys_renameat2
- access (heals branch): sys_faccessat

Reduces libc::syscall calls from 105 to 101.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
